title: PAN (Permanent Account Number)
content:
IRD-issued taxpayer ID mandatory for business and tax filing. Thresholds change with Finance Act — verify IRD/CA.
Roman: PAN liyeko chha, PAN darta garna parla.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: TDS (Tax Deducted at Source)
content:
Income Tax Act 2058: deduct at source on salary, rent, professional fees, contracts, interest. Rates/thresholds change with Finance Act — VERIFY with CA/IRD.
Roman: TDS kaateko, bhada ma TDS, TDS certificate.
AI must NOT give definitive TDS rates — flag for CA review.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Nepal Fiscal Year & Bikram Sambat
content:
FY: Shrawan 1 to Ashadh end (~mid-July). VAT returns monthly/quarterly — verify IRD. BS dates on invoices; ERP must accept BS and convert AD.
Roman: aarthik barsha, Shrawan 1 dekhi, 2081/04/05.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: IRD Reporting & Audit
content: IRD: VAT, TDS, income tax, advance tax, e-filing — verify ird.gov.np and CA. Audit above turnover thresholds — ICAN regulates.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Customs & Municipality Tax
content:
Imports: customs duty, import VAT, excise — verify Customs/CA.
Municipality business registration (byavsaaya darta), local tax — rates vary.
Roman: bhansaar tireko, municipality tax tireko.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)
